name: Golden Fried Cardoon
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Cardoon ribs; Leaves and ends trimmed
2 large Egg yolks beaten with one tablespoon water
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the water and vinegar. Using a vegetable peeler, remove the tough outer strings of the cardoon ribs. Cut the ribs into two-inch lengths, placing them in the water as you work. Drain the cardoon ribs and place them into a large saucepan of lightly salted water. Bring to a boil and cook until tender, about 30 minutes. Drain and pat dry, then let cool.
2. In a shallow bowl, combine the egg yolks and egg. In another bowl, toss the bread crumbs with the Parmesan cheese, 1/2 teaspoon of salt, and pepper. Dip the cardoon in the eggs, then dredge in the Parmesan and crumb mixture, patting if necessary to adhere.
3. In a medium skillet, heat about 1/2 inch of vegetable oil over moderately high heat until very hot. Add the cardoon in batches, frying for about 1 1/2 minutes per side until golden brown.
4. Sprinkle lightly with salt and pepper, then serve hot with lemon wedges.
